introSection: Runaway Mine Train is a steel roller coaster located at Cultus Lake Adventure Park in Cultus Lake, British Columbia, Canada. The ride opened in 2015 along with Blastin' Barrels.
fullText: Runaway Mine Train is a steel roller coaster located at Cultus Lake Adventure Park in Cultus Lake, British Columbia, Canada. The ride opened in 2015 along with Blastin' Barrels.
